prompt: An architectural diagram showing three horizontal layers stacked vertically. Top layer (Identity): three connected nodes representing brand identity, a registry, and accounts — all linked with clean lines. Middle layer (Transaction domains): four nodes in a row representing media buy, creative, signals, and sponsored intelligence — each with a distinct icon (shopping cart, paintbrush, antenna, speech bubble). Bottom layer (Governance): a single wide node with a shield icon that has dotted connection lines reaching up to every node in the transaction layer, showing it operates across all domains. Clean arrows flow downward from identity through transactions. The diagram feels architectural and organized — a clear system map. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Three-layer architecture diagram showing identity layer (brand, registry, accounts) at top, transaction domains (media buy, creative, signals, sponsored intelligence) in the middle, and governance as a cross-cutting layer connecting to all transaction domains

prompt: A four-tier ecosystem diagram. Top tier (Business): two figures shaking hands — a buying principal (business person with briefcase) and a media seller (person at a storefront). Second tier (Orchestration): a central media orchestration platform robot connected to three specialized agent robots — a signals agent (antenna icon), a sales agent (storefront icon), and a creative agent (palette icon) — via clean connection lines. Third tier (Execution): two connected systems — the Agentic eXecution Engine or AXE (circuit board icon) linked to a decisioning platform (server rack). Fourth tier (Governance, spanning full width): a governance agent robot with shield plus a human figure with clipboard, both connected by dotted lines to every tier above. The diagram flows top to bottom with clear separation between tiers. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Four-tier ecosystem diagram showing business principals at top, orchestration layer with specialized agents in the middle, technical execution below, and governance with human oversight spanning all layers
